Print Sheet: Fame: Well known on the East Coast
Strength - (Disarm, Grapple, Knock Down, or Pierce the Heart)
Resources:  Mostly old family holdings you shaved off your mortal family.  Oil exploration mainly.
Aspiring Harpy: Your are the veriest Kindred socialite.  Other young Kindred, though, do not have your refinement.  You are the idle rich, making the most of your undead gifts.
You know the status of everyone in your sect. Leadership will tell you how they got one of them. Alternative Idenity can let you earn and fake status. Maxium 5 Fleeting w/o merits.
Socializing has always been your strongest feature.
7/5/3 traits, 3/2/1 backgrounds, 2/1/1 disciplines, 4/3/3/2/2/2/1/1/1/1 abilities, 30pts freebie, 7pts merits max, 7pts flaws max - All Merit/Flaw/Freebies must be on XP Spends Sheet

rows: Aspiring Harpy: Your are the veriest Kindred socialite.  Other young Kindred, though, do not have your refinement.  You are the idle rich, making the most of your undead gifts.

Your sire was a bit of an odd duck for a Brujah and he seemed to pass that on to you.  He told you story upon story of his time as a socialite in the courts of europe and embraced you while visiting Washington DC a number of years ago.  As you were already from a political family, you'd had some experience with power and money, but introduction to the vampire world showed you where the true halls of power lie.  You recognize that builing alliances with Kindred across clans is the way to increase your social standing.  Human goverments have their lobbiests, but you recognize that a Harpy can operate in a similiar fashion, and a smart Harpy can hold more power than some Princes...
Your relationship to these people is described. This may mean they do not know you.
Though he was a member of the DC court after you'd left, his name has been banded about, especially as the newest Keeper of Elysium in LA
The Brujah Scourge on LA.  Probably want to reach out to him as soon as you can.
Prince of LA.  While you've never met her, her reputation for wealth and business means that her bank account is even greater than yours...
Assess who the movers and shakers are in the court and make alliances whith them.
Continue to grow your wealth.  LA is home to many million and billion-aires...
You've heard rumors that the New Promise Mandrinate is under more and more pressure.  This may open up avenues for increasing your wealth and influences.

You spend an unusual amount of time in Elysium. You see and are seen to such an extent that all of the movers and shakers of Elysium at least know who you are. Extended time spent in Elysium also gives you extended opportunities to interact with the Harpies and other Kindred of that stature — and they’ll know your name when you approach them. This Merit is generally taken by vampires that respect and attend Elysium on a regular basis. You have the Acclaimed Fleeting Status as an innate.

rows: How much xp am I spending?
If it is an out of clan discipline or a secondary skill who is the teacher?
Patrol around USC, 1 DTA and 1 Computer
Ability - Computer/science/ect that this is giving me a downtime.
My first action is going by a tip from Skullcrusher, i am investigating an incident that improper feeding that had occurred at the feeding ground located in Whittier.
Background - I am using a background to start or modify an action.
My next action is that i will be participating in a raid that Skullcrusher asked me to join him along with my fellow Brujahs against the Sabbat located at the San Pedro harbor.
Background - I am using a background to start or modify an action.
My next action will be taking appropriate action to correct the improper feeding practices made by two of the suspected kindreds within the Camarilla.
My next action is that I will be continue patrolling the Camarilla as part my normal duty.
Background - I am using a background to start or modify an action.

My character wishes to be become an active part of the blood hunt in finding and retiring any kindred who breaks the tradition of the Camerilla. Because he feels that his celerity, fortitude and presence can be better suited if he has a weapon.
Ability - Computer/science/ect that this is giving me a downtime.
My character had been Camerilla for quite sometime and is feeling that he can be of a more valuable asset by asking Skullcrusher to carry weapons of his choice
Background - I am using a background to start or modify an action.
Background - I am using a background to start or modify an action.
As a Primogen I have requested the Prince to acquire fortitude in my effort to become a more effective kindred in the Camerilla.
Ability - Computer/science/ect that this is giving me a downtime.
I’m using my crafting to modify and further design my surveillance drones  for patrolling purposes.
I am spending my downtime in Whittier to feed.
Background - I am using a background to start or modify an action.
I’m continuing to investigate the ongoing activities somewhere in the Port of Los Angeles.
I wish to use my earned XP to purchase my weapons for my experience has  taught me how to patrol.
I’m sensing one of the Neonites have been improperly feeding and should be investigated.
I’m spending my downtime in acquiring the discipline of fortitude from Ivy who will teach me that discipline. While at the same time I will teach her the discipline of celerity
Ability - Computer/science/ect that this is giving me a downtime.

I will be continuing my patrol duties in Whittier. I will be contacting fledgling kindred and subject them to appropriate interrogation to determine who has been committing improper feeding. When I determined which Kendra has committed improper feeding appropriate disciplinary action will be implemented.
Background - I am using a background to start or modify an action.
I will also continue investigating the improper feeding that allegedly took place in Whittier.
Done - I am not doing any more actions.
I am done with my downtime
I will be acquiring the discipline of fortitude as I will teach the discipline of Celerity
Background - I am using a background to start or modify an action.

I am tending to my wounds after engaging the unknown creature enemy  while I was patrolling the LA/LB harbor. I found traces of bodies being torn apart and found there are traces going back, once a week for nearly 4 months.  I then made sure that I am patrolling on the next night this is supposed to occur. I will investigate just what kind of creature was that at the time of my encounter.
Ability - Computer/science/ect that this is giving me a downtime.
I will be modifying my drones to patrol the area for a sign of the unknown creature. The newly modified drones will detect movements no matter how fast the unknown creature is going.
Done - I am not doing any more actions.
I am spending 1 point of blood to heal my wounds
Ability - Computer/science/et cetera that this is giving me a downtime.

I am currently investigating on the events what led to the assassination of the Prince and how to protect the new Prince and the Camerilla. As Primogen Bujah I am also looking into forming a squadron.
Background - I am using a background to start or modify an action.

I am doing upgrades and modifications on my drones to expand my patrolling abilities. I have also was scouring the junkyard and found and rebuilt the Ford Falcon XB GT Coupe police interceptor to further my patrolling capabilities.
I am spending my downtime in purchasing weapons and motion sensing devices for the patrol drones and my police interceptor.
Done - I am not doing any more actions.
